items.caption: In the center of the image, a man and a woman are standing in front of a large smartphone and microphones, suggesting they are recording a podcast or song. The man is on the left, wearing a black shirt and blue pants, holding a microphone, while the woman on the right is wearing an orange shirt and pants, also holding a microphone. Both are wearing headphones, indicating they are listening to the audio they are recording. The smartphone screen displays a waveform, which is typical for audio recording software, and there are various icons and symbols around the smartphone, including a heart, a music note, and a play button, further emphasizing the theme of music or audio production. The background is minimalistic with a light blue and pink color scheme, featuring a simple plant and a speech bubble, which might represent the audience or the listeners of their recording.
a close-up view of a hand holding a smartphone.
Young woman creating vlog content using a smartphone in a cozy indoor setting with wooden furniture.
items.creator: Mikhail Nilov
